description:
This event bundle contains 48 items commemorating players and organizations participating in the ELEAGUE 2018 Boston CS:GO Major Championship:
 ● One sticker for each of the 23 participating teams.
 ● One graffiti for each of the 23 participating teams.
 ● One ELEAGUE sticker.
 ● One ELEAGUE graffiti.
   (Does not include autographs and holo/foil capsules.)

50% of the proceeds from the sale of this event bundle support the included players and organizations.
name: Boston 2018 Mega Bundle
